sp_agent_chat_config.name: ITMS Virtual Agent

sys_update_version.name: sp_agent_chat_config_7d82bce5935d8f50945375dcebba10ea
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sp_agent_chat_config"><sp_agent_chat_config action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>false</active><name>ITMS Virtual Agent</name><order>100</order><portal>fd2a6d05ed45445c99baa815fb2b65a8</portal><public>false</public><roles/><server_script><![CDATA[(function($sp) {
    var isVAActive = GlidePluginManager.isActive('com.glide.cs.chatbot') || GlidePluginManager.isActive("com.glide.cs.chatbot.lite");
    var configObj = {};
    configObj.portal = $sp.getValue('url_suffix');
    configObj.live_agent_only = !isVAActive;
    configObj.consumer_account_context = 'itms';
    return configObj;
})($sp);]]></server_script><sys_class_name>sp_agent_chat_config</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-05 12:02:26</sys_created_on><sys_id>7d82bce5935d8f50945375dcebba10ea</sys_id><sys_mod_count>4</sys_mod_count><sys_name>ITMS Virtual Agent</sys_name><sys_package display_value="msdportal" source="x_146833_msdportal">d5d7a83f93898b10945375dcebba1081</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="msdportal">d5d7a83f93898b10945375dcebba1081</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sp_agent_chat_config_7d82bce5935d8f50945375dcebba10ea</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-05 12:06:44</sys_updated_on></sp_agent_chat_config><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=7d82bce5935d8f50945375dcebba10ea"/></record_update>
